scenario_description: User asks agent to modify slide titles, then interrupts to check the file size, then asks to continue adding content.

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true
DISPLAY=:1 xdotool key Escape 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.3; DISPLAY=:1 xdotool search --class 'soffice' windowfocus windowraise 2>/dev/null || DISPLAY=:1 wmctrl -xa 'soffice.Soffice' 2>/dev/null || true

phases.instruction: Change the title on slide 1 to 'Introduction to Game Theory'
Wait - can you check the file size of this presentation? Use 'ls -lh' in a terminal to see how big the file is on Desktop
OK, now go back to the presentation and add a new slide at the end with the title 'Key Takeaways' and the text 'Game theory helps us understand strategic interactions.' Save the file.

result.command: python3 -c "from pptx import Presentation; p=Presentation('/home/user/Desktop/Game Theory.pptx'); texts=' '.join(r.text for s in p.slides for sh in s.shapes if sh.has_text_frame for pa in sh.text_frame.paragraphs for r in pa.runs); print(texts)"
